response.justification: Bogdan possesses the minimum 15 years of software engineering experience and demonstrates a strong entrepreneurial spirit through his open-source projects and startup roles. However, the position requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy and enterprise cloud transformation. His AI experience is relatively recent and implementation-focused, lacking the strategic, high-level advisory and leadership scope expected for this role.
strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15+ years of software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and builder traits as the founder of GISCollective and an open-source contributor.
Has recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and utilizing Model Context Protocol (MCP).
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership and enterprise advisory experience expected of a Principal Engineer in this context.
AI expertise appears to be a recent addition rather than representing deep, recognized industry authority or advanced academic research.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
